name: E C de CANO
notes:
The AREA 51 Telecom is a medium ISP and Eyeball based in the city of Ponta Porã, which is 350km (217 miles) from the capital of the state of Mato Grosso do Sul in Brazil in the far west of the country we serve as a transit operator for other providers in the region. The AREA 51 Telecom has infrastructure in 6 cities close to Ponta Porã city, connecting customers with very high quality optical fiber.

IRR/RPKI: http://irrexplorer.nlnog.net/search/268791

Peering Requests: peering@area51telecom.com.br

Operational Issues (24/7): noc@area51telecom.com.br
